trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

videos_without_transcripts.title: Grand Theft Auto VI: Official Cover Art Reveal
videos_without_transcripts.description:
Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers.

Check out the official cover art, also available as downloadable artwork at rockstargames.com/VI

observations: There is a strong presence of entertainment-related content, specifically focusing on movies, series, and gaming.
Anime content, such as the Chainsaw Man trailer, is gaining traction, indicating a growing interest in this genre.
Trailers and teaser content are popular, suggesting a high audience interest in upcoming releases and exclusive previews.

notable_channels: MAPPA CHANNEL, known for anime content, indicates a strong following in this genre.
Sony Pictures Entertainment and IGN reflect a focus on mainstream entertainment and gaming.
observations: Most channels are uploading individual trending videos, suggesting a strategy of focusing on high-impact releases rather than volume.
Collaboration or cross-promotion between channels in similar genres (e.g., gaming and movies) could leverage overlapping audiences.

anime_and_manga.insight: Invest in content related to popular anime series or upcoming releases to capture a growing viewer base.
anime_and_manga.action: Consider collaborations with anime studios or influencers to create behind-the-scenes content or fan interactions.

gaming.insight: Gaming content, particularly involving popular franchises, continues to perform well.
gaming.action: Develop content around game reviews, playthroughs, or community events to engage with the gaming audience.

movies_and_series.insight: High interest in trailers indicates a market for in-depth analysis or speculation content.
movies_and_series.action: Create detailed content dissecting trailers for hidden details or future plot predictions to capitalize on viewer curiosity.

engagement_trends: Videos related to well-known franchises like Spider-Man and Grand Theft Auto are likely to receive higher views due to established fan bases.
Interactive or evolving content formats, such as the 'Being Hunted' video, suggest a demand for innovative and engaging viewer experiences.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
